steps.title: Use the increase multiplier
steps.content: A $40\%$ increase means the new amount is $140\%$ of the old amount. As a multiplier, that is $1.40$.

steps.title: Multiply the old amount
steps.content:
Maya had $45$ plants last year, so multiply by the increase multiplier:
\[45(1.40)=63\]
The answer is 63.
